package.name: howiezz-competitor-source-material
package.purpose: Grouped source material for downstream agents focused on competitor lineup, line architecture, and pricing analysis.

groups.title: Executive Context
groups.description: Topline conclusions and ranked competitive findings.

groups.title: Independent Competitor Groupings
groups.description: Line architecture and pricing groupings for independent competitors, including WM and ZELEX normalization outcomes.

groups.title: Competitor Family Coverage
groups.description: Cross-competitor family coverage matrix and structured coverage payloads.

groups.title: Visual Assets
groups.description: Heatmap artifacts for rapid visual comparison and slide-ready reuse.

groups.title: Source Catalog Datasets
groups.description: Raw or near-raw catalog and crawl outputs used to construct grouped analytics.

groups.title: Generation Pipeline
groups.description: Scripts to rebuild taxonomy, competitor coverage, and independent grouping outputs.

recommended_agent_flow: Load db/independent_catalog_groupings.json for machine-consumable grouped metrics.
Use docs/research/independent-catalog-grouping-heatmap.md and CSV for table-ready context.
Consult db/independent_competitor.sqlite for custom SQL segmentation.
Rebuild with scripts/analyze_independent_groupings.py if source data changes.
